claim: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Read-only audit of graph health and provenance/source/chunk/claim lineage. Found graph health score reaches 0 because src/graph-health.ts uses a narrow source resolver that ignores accepted-record lineage fields used by writers, especially evidence.source and source_paths. Persisted graph-health artifact reported accepted_without_source_count=302, source_mapping_missing_count=302, score=0. Also found three accepted JSON records currently invalid, which can make a rerun fail before scoring.
